name: oh-my-gajae-code
description: oh-my-gajae-code — focused Gajae Code suite with 6 skills and 8 commands. Skills: adaptive-response, no-english, extragoal, insane-review, deep-onboarding, multi-harness-research. Commands: /omg, /omg:setup, /omg:gate, /omg:gate-always, /omg:no-english, /omg:insane-review, /omg:deep-onboarding, /omg:multi-harness. Multi-harness research is explicit-only, directly fans one identical task to exactly four read-only harnesses, and writes results only outside the project in XDG state; it requires Linux, bubblewrap, existing provider logins, and a private user runtime binding.
